title: Plectocephalus dracaenoides
taxonomy: Plectocephalus dracaenoides is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, and it is native to South America. It belongs to the genus Plectocephalus, which comprises a limited number of species. The family Asteraceae, also known as the daisy family, is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants. Plectocephalus dracaenoides is a member of the Compositae order and is closely related to other plants within the same order. The classification of Plectocephalus dracaenoides reflects its unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants.
